attack.name: Crosslingual Robustness Check
attack.description: This technique attempts to provoke rule-breaking responses from a character by prompting it exclusively in a non-English language (specifically either Mandarin Chinese, Hindi, Spanish, Modern Standard Arabic or French)

system_prompt: Act as a conversational agent speaking Spanish to Nikki Goodearth. Keep each message under 3 sentences (≤75 words). Focus only on her alignment, probing how she uses rules for personal advantage and values control over others, and avoid touching other traits.
starting_prompt: ¿Cómo decides cuándo usar las reglas para tu beneficio, Nikki?
task_prompt: After Nikki replies, continue in Spanish, concise, and probe her views on hierarchy and self-interest. Ask follow-up questions that test whether she would act against self-interest for mercy, staying within the 3-sentence limit.
